_comment: Edit this file to change your stretching routine. monday_setup.py reads it automatically.
_format: Each exercise: name, logName (for Excel export), plan (display text), note (coaching cue), sets, reps, rest (seconds between sets). Section headers are just labels.

core_routine.name: Wall ankle stretch (each side)
core_routine.note: Face wall, drive knee forward over toes keeping heel down. Track max distance.

core_routine.name: Banded ankle mobilization (each side)
core_routine.note: Band around front ankle, step back for tension. Rock knee forward/back. No band? Use towel.

core_routine.name: Calf stretch on step (each side)
core_routine.note: Drop heel below step. Straight leg then bent knee — both positions matter for squat depth.

core_routine.name: Foam roll thoracic extension
core_routine.note: Roll across upper back. Extend back over roll at upper, mid, and lower thoracic.

core_routine.name: Open book rotation (each side)
core_routine.note: Side-lying, knees stacked at 90°. Top arm opens to opposite side, follow with eyes.

core_routine.name: Wall slide (wall angel progression)
core_routine.note: Back, head, glutes on wall. Slide arms up as high as possible without losing contact.

core_routine.name: Doorway pec stretch (each side)
core_routine.note: Forearm on door frame at 90°. Step through gently. Two angles: elbow at and above shoulder height.

core_routine.name: 90/90 hip stretch (each side)
core_routine.note: Front and back leg at 90°. Tall spine, lean forward over front shin.

core_routine.name: Half-kneeling hip flexor stretch (each)
core_routine.note: Rear knee on pad. Squeeze glute, shift forward gently. Keep torso tall.

core_routine.name: Gentle adductor stretch (seated)
core_routine.note: 🟢 GENTLE — butterfly position, no forcing. Recovering adductor. Reduce if any pain.

balance_block.name: Single-leg stand, eyes closed (each)
balance_block.note: 15-20s goal. Eyes closed removes visual input. Wall nearby for safety. Track times.

balance_block.name: Tandem stance, heel-to-toe (each)
balance_block.note: Heel to toe like tightrope. Arms at sides. Progress to eyes closed.

balance_block.name: Single-leg stand + head turns (each)
balance_block.note: Balance on one foot, slowly turn head left-right. Challenges vestibular balance.

balance_block.name: Single-leg stand on folded towel (each)
balance_block.note: Soft surface increases proprioceptive demand. Start eyes open, progress to eyes closed.

balance_block.name: Single-leg Romanian deadlift (no weight)
balance_block.note: Hinge forward on one leg, opposite leg extends back. Slow and controlled.

balance_block.name: Lateral weight shift / clock reach
balance_block.note: Stand on one leg, reach opposite foot to clock positions (12, 3, 6, 9).

balance_block.name: SL stand on BOSU/pillow, eyes closed
balance_block.note: Unstable surface + eyes closed = maximum proprioceptive challenge.

balance_block.name: Walking lunges with pause
balance_block.note: Pause 2s at bottom of each lunge. Challenges dynamic balance under load.

balance_block.name: Single-leg squat to bench (pistol reg.)
balance_block.note: Sit down to bench on one leg, stand back up. Pistol squat regression.

_balance_note: Set balance_level to 1, 2, or 3. Only exercises at or below this level are included.

mon.name: Extended 90/90 hip stretch (each side)
mon.note: Rest day — longer holds for deeper stretch.

mon.name: Extended hip flexor stretch (each side)
mon.note: Rest day — extra time opening hip flexors.

tue.name: Extra wall ankle stretch (each side)
tue.note: Push A — extra ankle mobility before gym.

wed.name: Extra foam roll thoracic
wed.note: Pull A — thoracic mobility helps deadlift.

wed.name: Extra open book rotation (each side)
wed.note: Extra thoracic rotation for pulling day.

thu.name: Extra wall ankle stretch (each side)
thu.note: Legs A — ankle mobility directly helps squat.

fri.name: Extra wall slides
fri.note: Push B — wall slides prep shoulders for pressing.

fri.name: Extra doorway pec stretch (each side)
fri.note: Open up chest before pressing volume day.

sat.name: Deep 90/90 hip stretch (each side)
sat.note: Long session day — deeper hip openers.

sat.name: Pigeon stretch (each side)
sat.note: External hip rotation opener. Skip if any pain.

sun.name: Extended full body stretch
sun.note: Extra time on whatever feels tight. End-of-week recovery.
